# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2018-05-01/subscriptionDeploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
metadata:
  description: >
    Assigns the Contributor role to an existing Service Principal at subscription scope
    for CI/CD pipeline deployments. Deploy using:
    az deployment sub create --location <region> --template-file template.yaml --parameters servicePrincipalObjectId=<object-id>

parameters:
  servicePrincipalObjectId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: >
        The Object ID (not Application/Client ID) of the Service Principal.
        Retrieve with: az ad sp show --id <appId> --query id -o tsv

  roleDefinitionId:
    type: string
    defaultValue: b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c
    metadata:
      description: >
        The GUID of the role definition to assign.
        Default is the built-in Contributor role.
        Contributor: b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c
        Reader: acdd72a7-3385-48ef-bd42-f606fba81ae7

  roleAssignmentName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[guid(subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('servicePrincipalObjectId'), parameters('roleDefinitionId'))]"
    metadata:
      description: >
        A unique GUID for the role assignment. Defaults to a deterministic GUID
        derived from subscription, principal, and role to ensure idempotency.

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[parameters('roleAssignmentName')]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', parameters('roleDefinitionId'))]"
      principalId: "[parameters('servicePrincipalObjectId')]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: Contributor role for CI/CD pipeline Service Principal

outputs:
  roleAssignmentId:
    type: string
    value: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', parameters('roleAssignmentName'))]"
  roleAssignmentName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('roleAssignmentName')]"
  assignedRoleDefinition:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('roleDefinitionId')]"
  assignedPrincipal:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('servicePrincipalObjectId')]"
